message:
fix(tests): Use acquire() instead of try_acquire() for resource creation

Pool integration tests were incorrectly using try_acquire() expecting it
to create resources, but try_acquire() only returns idle resources.

Changes:
- Add acquire_resource() helper that uses async acquire()
- Pre-populate concurrent/load test pools before try_acquire() loops
- Replace try_acquire().expect() with acquire_resource() or block_on()
- Fix pool_reuses_returned_resources to create first resource properly

Fixes bd-2520.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
